name: WhatsApp
description: Send WhatsApp messages and summarize group conversations

functions.name: getLatestMessage
functions.description: Get the latest message from a specific WhatsApp chat (group or DM)
functions.output_format: Latest WhatsApp message with sender and time.
keywords: what is the latest message from

functions.name: summarizeConversation
functions.description: Summarize recent messages from a specific WhatsApp chat (group or DM)
functions.output_format: Short summary of the requested WhatsApp conversation.

functions.name: getNewMessagesDigest
functions.description: Show and summarize new WhatsApp messages since last check across DMs and groups
functions.output_format: Digest of new WhatsApp messages and key updates.
keywords: what did i miss on whatsapp

workflows.name: send_whatsapp_message
workflows.description: Collect recipient and message, then send a WhatsApp message

required_params.name: recipient
required_params.description: Please provide recipient name or phone number.

required_params.name: message
required_params.description: Please provide the WhatsApp message text.

optional_params.name: group
optional_params.description: Optional: provide a group name if this should be sent to a group.
